text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Student Counseling Services * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST PORTLAND OFFICE OREGON REFUGEE SCHOOL IMPACT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides educational support services to refugee newcomers and their schools. Supports students and their families in school registrations, school orientations, referrals to enrichment programs, interpretation during parent conferences, and a summer school readiness program. 7931 NE Halsey Street Suite 200 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Refugees ages 6-18 years who have been in the United States for less than 12 months Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-2:30pm Email (971) 888-7831 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST OREGON REFUGEE SCHOOL IMPACT PROGRAM
